title: Curry Chicken Necks
excerpt: As kids we used to fight over the chicken neck. These days it's almost something nobody bothers with. But if you cook chicken necks properly, you'll be licking your fingers. Mine I curried. CHICKEN NECKS INGREDIENTS 12 necks 100 ml cake flour Oil to fry it in 1 onion …
html:
As kids we used to fight over the chicken neck. These days it's almost something nobody bothers with. But if you cook the chicken neck properly, you'll be licking your fingers. Mine I curried.

CHICKEN NECKS

INGREDIENTS

  • 12 necks
  • 100 ml cake flour
  • Oil to fry it in
  • 1 onion
  • 2 cloves garlic
  • 20 ml finely grated fresh ginger
  • 1 chilli finely chopped
  • 5 ml coarse jeera
  • 20 ml curry powder
  • 10 ml turmeric
  • 1 tin tomato puree
  • 10 ml sugar
  • 3 bay leaves
  • 5 ml cumin
  • 5 ml coriander
  • Salt and pepper

METHOD

  1. Shake the necks in flour and fry them brown in a pan. Remove and set aside.
  2. Fry your onions, garlic, ginger and chilli in a little oil.
  3. Fry all the spices together with the onion mixture.
  4. Mix the sugar with the tomato puree and the bay leaves. Add it to the onion mixture.
  5. Salt and pepper to taste.
  6. Let it simmer for 10 minutes. Add the necks and just cook through. Serve it with samp and beans.
